definition:
Σολομών, -ῶνος (so prop., but Rec. has frequently -ῶν, -ῶντος, as also WH in Act.3:11 5:12; in Act.7:47 T has Σαλωμών, as LXX freq., indecl.; see B1., § 10, 1; Tdf., Prol., 104, 119; WH, App., 158), ὁ (Heb. שְׁלֹמֹה), 
 Solomon: Mat.1:6-7 6:29 12:42, Luk.11:31 12:27, Jhn.10:23, Act.3:11 5:12 7:47.†
 (AS)
